mapper.insert: insert into group_chat(group_name, group_description, creator_id, create_time, update_time, status, number, icon) values ( #{groupName}, #{groupDescription}, #{creatorId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status}, #{number}, #{icon})
mapper.update:
update group_chat
group_name = #{groupName},
group_description = #{groupDescription},
update_time = #{updateTime},
icon = #{icon},
where id = #{id}
